# n8n-nodes-alterlab

Scrape any website from n8n — anti-bot bypass, JS rendering, structured extraction, OCR, and more.

**[Get Started Free →](https://app.alterlab.io/signin?redirect=/dashboard/keys&source=n8n&utm_source=n8n&utm_medium=integration&utm_campaign=community_node)** $1 free credit — up to 5,000 scrapes.

## Installation

In your n8n instance:

1. Go to **Settings → Community Nodes**
2. Enter `n8n-nodes-alterlab`
3. Click **Install**

Or via CLI:

```bash
npm install n8n-nodes-alterlab
```

## Setup

1. **Get an API key**: [Sign up free](https://app.alterlab.io/signin?redirect=/dashboard/keys&source=n8n&utm_source=n8n&utm_medium=integration&utm_campaign=community_node) or [find your existing key](https://app.alterlab.io/dashboard/keys?utm_source=n8n&utm_medium=integration&utm_campaign=community_node)
2. In n8n, go to **Credentials → New → AlterLab API**
3. Paste your API key and save

## Features

| Feature | Description | Credit Cost |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| **Auto Mode** | Smart tier selection — starts cheap, escalates only if needed | Varies by tier |
| **JS Rendering** | Full headless browser for JavaScript-heavy sites | +3 credits |
| **Screenshots** | Full-page PNG capture | +1 credit |
| **PDF Generation** | Render any page as PDF | +2 credits |
| **OCR** | Extract text from images | +5 credits |
| **Premium Proxy** | Route through residential proxies for anti-bot bypass | +1 credit |
| **Structured Extraction** | Extract products, articles, jobs, recipes, events, FAQs | Free |
| **Custom Schema** | Define your own JSON schema for data extraction | Free |
| **Caching** | Cache responses to reduce costs (60s–24h TTL) | Free |

## Scraping Tiers

AlterLab uses a tiered system that automatically escalates from cheapest to most capable:

| Tier | Name | Price | Best For |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| T1 | Curl | $0.0002 | Static pages, APIs |
| T2 | HTTP | $0.0003 | Sites with TLS fingerprinting |
| T3 | Stealth | $0.0005 | Anti-bot protected sites |
| T3.5 | Light JS | $0.0007 | JSON extraction without browser |
| T4 | Browser | $0.001 | JavaScript-heavy SPAs |

Use **Cost Controls** to set budgets, force tiers, or optimize for cost vs. speed.

## Example Workflows

### Price Monitor
Scrape product pages daily, extract prices with the Product profile, compare to previous values, and send alerts via Slack or email.

### News Digest
Scrape multiple news sources on a schedule, extract articles with the Article profile, summarize with an AI node, and send a daily email digest.

### Job Tracker
Monitor job boards, extract listings with the Job Posting profile, deduplicate against a database, and push new listings to a spreadsheet.

### Competitor Watch
Scrape competitor pages weekly, extract structured data, compare changes over time, and generate reports.

## Node Reference

### Inputs

- **URL** (required) — The page to scrape
- **Mode** — auto, html, js, pdf, ocr

### Output

Every successful scrape returns a flat JSON object:

```
{{ $json.markdown }}          — Markdown content
{{ $json.text }}              — Plain text content
{{ $json.json }}              — Structured JSON data
{{ $json.html }}              — HTML content
{{ $json.title }}             — Page title
{{ $json.filteredContent }}   — Schema-filtered extraction
{{ $json.billing.credits }}   — Credits charged
{{ $json.billing.tier }}      — Tier used
{{ $json.billing.suggestion }}— Cost optimization tip
{{ $json.screenshotUrl }}     — Screenshot URL (if enabled)
{{ $json.pdfUrl }}            — PDF URL (if enabled)
```
